name: text-to-lottie-studio
description: Turn text prompts into production-grade, art-directed Lottie animations rendered in a local Skia/Skottie player.

interface.shortDescription: Author virtuoso Lottie animations from a prompt.
interface.longDescription: An expert motion-design skill plus a local Skia/Skottie player. The agent reads the context of your brief, picks a bold direction, and authors art-directed Lottie JSON — self-drawing lines, kinetic typography, liquid morphs, particle bursts, seamless loops — then verifies it renders. Includes a reference library on motion craft, a Skottie-accurate technique toolbox, and a procedural-generation cookbook. Great for animating logos and filling a website with motion.
defaultPrompt: Animate my logo from logo.svg as a Lottie line-draw reveal.
Create 3 Lottie animations to fill my landing page.
Make a seamless Lottie loading loop, 60fps, dark theme.
